query:
UPDATE workout_session_exercises
         SET status           = 'active',
             started_at       = strftime('%Y-%m-%dT%H:%M:%fZ', 'now'),
             paused_offset_sec = (
                 SELECT COALESCE(wss.paused_total_sec, 0)
                 FROM workout_session_sets wss
                 WHERE wss.id = (
                     SELECT workout_session_set_id
                     FROM workout_session_exercises
                     WHERE id = ?
                 )
             )
         WHERE id = ?
